name: Landing page loads with hero section and CTA buttons
description: When a visitor opens Mantiz, the landing page renders the hero section headline about AI lie detection, along with at least two call-to-action buttons (e.g. Scan Diff and GitHub login).

planSteps.description: The hero section is visible with a headline that mentions AI lie detection or trust score for code
At least one call-to-action button linking to the scan or login page is visible in the hero area
